# Plant energy storage molecule

## Short Teaching Summary
Plant energy storage molecule: Starch is an insoluble storage molecule that most plants (like rice, potatoes, and wheat) use to store energy. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
